title: Naagdhari
desc: A man with the ability to shapeshift into a snake battles diabolical and evil forces determined to harm him and his beloved.

title: Saas Kamal Bahu Dhamal
desc: After arriving in a village that has been cursed by a sage, Lakshmi, a well-educated bride, resolves to find a solution.

title: Farishta
desc: A father rejects his son with a mental disability and sends him to prison. However, years later the father and son reunite during a troubling time in their lives.

title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
desc: Madhu is shattered after her own uncles try to kill her in order to usurp her wealth. However, hope comes in the form of Nirav, a poor auto driver, and the former falls in love with him.

title: Dilwala
desc: A joint family gets separated when the eldest son marries his employer's daughter and the second son decides to go abroad. The youngest son takes care of his parents and brings the family together.

title: Baaghi - Ek Yodha
desc: A soldier falls in love with a woman and decides to make her his life partner. However, his family is against his wishes and abandons him.
